text: NASA's Artemis II crew readies for Monday's lunar flyby. Here's what you need to know - NPR
fullText: At its closest point, the crew of Artemis II will loop about 4,000 miles from the lunar surface late Monday. The astronauts will also venture farther into space than any previous human mission.

text: Oil prices rise again after Trump threatens to strike Iran's power plants - Business Insider
fullText: Oil prices rose after President Donald Trump leveled a profanity-laden threat against Iran on Sunday.

text: Oil back above $110 after expletive-laden Trump threat to Iran - BBC
fullText: Brent crude rose above $110 before those gains eased after a report of US-Iran talks over a potential ceasefire.

text: Asian shares mostly gain while oil prices keep rising - AP News
fullText: Asian markets that are open for trading are mostly rising as investors continue to closely watch the war in Iran, soaring oil prices and what President Donald Trump might say next. Japan’s benchmark Nikkei 225 and South Korea’s Kospi has gained in early Monda…

text: ‘Dark Winds’ Finale Closes One Case — Then Ends With a Shocking Murder - The Hollywood Reporter
fullText: Someone dies "with his boots on" in the finale, in a game-changer for Joe Leaphorn and the rest of the Navajo Tribal Police. The show’s team weighs in here with The Hollywood Reporter.

text: UCLA storms past South Carolina to claim its 1st NCAA women's basketball title - NPR
fullText: UCLA secured the first NCAA women's basketball national championship in school history — a goal that was set after losing in the first Final Four last season.

text: Huff scores 3 as West Virginia tops Oklahoma for CBC title - ESPN
fullText: West Virginia beat Oklahoma 89-82 in overtime on Sunday to win the College Basketball Crown Tournament championship.

text: 'Super Mario Galaxy Movie' clobbers 'Project Hail Mary' with $372 million global box office start - Entertainment Weekly
fullText: The 'Super Mario Galaxy Movie' just beat 'Project Hail Mary' in the space race. Nintendo's follow-up to its 2023 commercial giant crushed the box office this weekend with a $372 million global premiere.

text: Melanie Griffith Reacts to Daughter Dakota Johnson Dating Role Model - Yahoo
fullText: Melanie Griffith threw her support behind daughter Dakota Johnson's relationship with Role Model, calling the couple's budding romance "fabulous."

text: A gray whale that swam 20 miles up a Washington state river is found dead - AP News
fullText: A juvenile gray whale that swam 20 miles up a river in Washington state has been found dead. A marine mammal research group suspects hunger drove the whale to new hunting grounds. The whale was discovered Saturday in the Willapa River, which feeds into the oc…

text: Russian Offensive Campaign Assessment, April 5, 2026 - Institute for the Study of War
fullText: Ukrainian forces have intensified their long-range strike campaign against Russian oil infrastructure within roughly the last two weeks.

text: ‘Reflect on the meaning of His divine names’: Conference speakers testify of Christ’s titles - Church News
fullText: In the April 2026 general conference, Church leaders testified of Jesus Christ as the “True Vine,” “Repairer,” the “Way,” “Personal Guide” and more.

text: Study Reveals the Single Cause of Cognitive Decline—and a Cure - inc.com
fullText: Researchers pinpoint a lone protein that speeds up the dysfunction of an aging brain. Eliminating it, they claim, can reverse the damage.

text: Isaacman defends NASA budget proposal despite steep cuts - SpaceNews
fullText: NASA Administrator Jared Isaacman defended a fiscal year 2027 budget proposal that would cut the agency’s budget by nearly 25%.
